name: replit-data-handling
description: Implement secure data handling on Replit: PostgreSQL, KV Database, Object Storage, and data security patterns. Use when handling sensitive data, connecting databases, implementing data access patterns, or ensuring secure data flow in Replit-hosted applications. Trigger with phrases like "replit data", "replit database", "replit PostgreSQL", "replit storage", "replit data security", "replit GDPR".
